name: InputChecklistTask
description: Describes a task to add to a checklist.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the task; must be positive and unique among all task identifiers currently present in the checklist

fields.name: text
fields.description: Text of the task; 1-100 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the text. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: text_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the text, which can be specified instead of parse_mode. Currently, only bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, spoiler, custom_emoji, and date_time entities are allowed.
